headline: Germany's KNDS Owners Sell 25% Stake Pre-IPO

article.title: Germany, KNDS Family Owners Agree on Stake Sale Ahead of IPO
article.summary: Families that own half of tankmaker KNDS NV agreed to sell a 40% stake to the German government, according to people familiar with the matter, paving the way for one of Europe’s key defense companies to go public.

article.title: CRH Near Biggest-Ever Deal For Arcosa, Financial Times Says
article.summary: Building materials group CRH Plc. is close to its biggest deal ever to acquire competitor Arcosa Inc., and an agreement could come as soon as next week, the Financial Times reports, citing people familiar with the matter.

headline: Kalshi Nears $2B IPO Amid Crypto Surge

headline: Mercury 2 AI Tops Google, $10M Crypto Stake

headline: $7.5M MEV Bot Drained in Crypto Heist

article.title: Notorious ‘jaredfromsubway’ MEV bot drained for roughly $7.5 million in counter-MEV honeypot
